titleStmt.title: SII 22.232: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 232. (A.R. No. 232 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, GINGEE TALUK, EYIL. ON A SECOND ROCK TO THE SOUTH OF THE VILLAGE.

summary.p: This is dated merely in the cyclic year Īśvara and records a grant of some lands as tirunāmattukkāṇi to the temple of Tirumāḍappēṟuḍaiya Nāyanār at Eyil alias Rājēndraśōḻanallūr by a lady by name Tiruvēṅgaṇa-Nāchchi alias Būppaṇa Māṇikkattār by the order of one Narasiṅgarāja-Uḍaiyar. The identity of this chief is not clear. Eyil is said to be situated in Murugamaṅgalap-paṟṟu, a division of Siṅgapura-vaḷanāḍu in Palkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yicura varuṣam Āṭi mātam 5 tiyati ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu
palkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu ciṅkaperuvaḷanāṭṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu Irā( ca
centira) centiracoḻanallūr Āṉa Eyil tiṟappil teṟtillaiyil paḻam pūṇṭiyil Eri Etur
vāykku (vākku) vaṭameṟku kiḻaikkuṉṟattil cellappeṇṭirentalum naṉcai nilamum Erivāy
ciṟumalaiyāṉental Ellaittaṟuvarikku kiḻakkum paṭṭittollai tātakāṟukku kiḻakkum
Uḷpaṭṭa puṉcai nilamum pātaivaḻikkum kucavaṉ kuḷattukkum teṟkum teṉkiḻakkum Uḷpaṭṭa
puṉcai nilamum Uṭaiyār tirumāṭappeṟuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirunāmakkāṇi Āka Ulakaṉār
makaḷ tiruveṅkaṇa nācciy pūppaṇamāṇikkattāṟku naraciṅkarāca Uṭaiyar kuṭutta
nirupapaṭikku Uṭaiyavaṟku tāṉam tārai viṭṭamaikku kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉamāy
varuṣam Oṉṟukku cūlavariāka patiṉañcu paṇam Iṟuttu cantiṟātitta varaiyum Aṉupavittu
koṇṭu Erimiṉ paṇamum tāṅkaḷe taṇṭukoḷḷakkaṭavar Ākavum Inta taṉmattukku
Akutam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkai karaiyil karāmpacuvaik koṉṟatu pāvattile
pokakkaṭavar Ākavum .
Digital edition of SII 22.232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
